confidence_notes: Extracted only skills with explicit work or project evidence. Excluded Python (explicitly stated 'never used professionally'), Rust (explicitly stated 'not yet learned'), React (explicitly stated 'want to learn after graduation, haven't started'), Node.js (mentioned in job posting, not used), Tailwind CSS (mentioned in internship description, not used), GraphQL (read-only exposure at internship, not written), Figma (explicitly stated 'reviewer only, not a Figma user'). Chrome DevTools and VS Code excluded as they are development environments, not technical skills. Internship experience confirms HTML, CSS, JavaScript usage.
